data.title: Crypto Is ‘The Future,’ House Financial Services Oversight Subcommittee Chair Says
data.description:
Congressman Bill Huizenga (R-MI) said digital assets are “the future” while discussing potential crypto policy during a key House Financial Services Committee hearing on Wednesday.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/crypto-is-the-future-house-financial-services-oversight-subcommittee-chair-says/

data.title: 'A Different Era': Bored Ape Creator Yuga Labs Wants to Kill the ApeCoin DAO
data.description:
Bored Ape Yacht Club creator Yuga Labs has proposed axing the ApeCoin DAO, with plans to create a new entity to oversee the Ethereum token.
source: https://decrypt.co/323902/bored-ape-creator-yuga-labs-wants-kill-apecoin-dao

data.title: Circle's Stock Surges on First Day of Trading
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Circle experienced a significant increase on its first day of trading, with shares rising by 168.48%. The stock closed at $83.23, and the trading volume for the day reached $47.109 million.

data.title: South Korean Parliament ‘Poised to Approve Tokenized Securities Bill’
data.description:
The South Korean parliament could soon approve a draft tokenized securities bill, finally giving domestic firms the right to launch blockchain technology-powered coins tied to real estate, raw materials, livestock, and copyrighted works.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/south-korean-parliament-poised-to-approve-tokenized-securities-bill/

data.title: Dogecoin crashes by 10% as Elon Musk breaks ties with Trump administration
data.description:
Dogecoin tanked 10% today, with its weeklong losses now sitting at 22%, after Elon Musk officially walked away from Donald Trump’s administration and cut ties with the Department of Government Efficiency, known by its ironic acronym, DOGE. The crash unfolded alongside a brutal political brawl between Elon and the sitting US president, and it dragged […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/dogecoin-crashes-elon-breaks-ties-with-trump/

data.title: USDC Treasury Burns 75 Million USDC on Ethereum Blockchain
data.description: According to PANews, Whale Alert has reported that the Ethereum blockchain address 0x55fe…44b8, associated with the USDC Treasury, conducted a significant transaction on June 6, 2025. At 7:03 AM UTC+8, the address destroyed 75 million USDC tokens. This event marks a notable movement in the cryptocurrency market, reflecting ongoing adjustments in digital asset management.

data.title: Arca sends ‘best wishes’ to Circle after IPO and NYSE listing: ‘choke on your success’
data.description:
Circle’s stellar NYSE debut Thursday quickly soured after longtime partner and crypto investment firm Arca publicly torched the stablecoin issuer over what it called a betrayal of crypto-native allies in favor of Wall Street. Shares of Circle (CRCL. N), the company behind the USDC stablecoin, opened at $69, more than doubling its IPO price of $31 […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/arca-criticize-circle-after-ipo-nyse-listing/

data.title: Tesla Shares Falls Over 10% With Trump Musk Feud
data.description:
Catenaa, Thursday, June 05, 2025- Tesla shares dropped by over 10% on Thursday as US President Donald Trump and Elon Musk feuded over the tax bill. “I’m very disappointed, because Elon knew the inner workings of this bill better than almost anybody sitting here, better than you people,” Trump said to reporters in the Oval […]
source: https://investors.catenaa.com/news/tesla-shares-falls-over-10-with-trump-musk-feud

data.title: Tether invests in Shiga digital to expand USDT adoption across Africa
data.description:
6-6-2025 – Tether, the issuer of the world’s most-used stablecoin, USDT, has announced a strategic investment in Shiga Digital, a promising blockchain startup based in Abu Dhabi, as part of its broader Africa expansion strategy. The deal, revealed on Thursday, highlights Tether’s growing ambition to revolutionise financial systems in underserved regions. Shiga Digital: A startup [.
source: https://www.cointrackdaily.com/tether-invests-in-shiga-digital-to-expand-usdt-adoption-across-africa/

data.title: Ethereum Price At Crossroads As Volatility Risks Loom
data.description:

source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/06/05/ethereum-price-at-crossroads-as-volatility-risks-loom/

The drop hit during a brutal week for Donald Trump, who’s been fighting battles on multiple fronts—including a messy falling out with Elon Musk and a legal clash inside his own […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/bitcoin-tumbles-to-100k-as-trump-plunges-12/
